title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Recovery Bay
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a context and durable-memory policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Working Memory, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Working Memory record says a context and durable-memory policy looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve inspect the failure record.

For inspect the failure record, apply Working Memory without its stated preconditions, omit the a context and durable-memory policy trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Working Memory for a context and durable-memory policy.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair

steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Memory Privacy into observable performance evidence.
